Things You Never Have to Google Again

Your website has enough acronyms already.

DNS. SSL. CDN. MX. TXT. SPF. DKIM. DMARC. SEO. Schema. Core Web Vitals. XML sitemaps. Canonical URLs. Robots.txt.

You do not need to know what any of that means. That is what Sites Covered is here for.

DNSSSLCDNMX RecordsCNAMETXT VerificationSPFDKIMDMARCSchemaSitemapsCore Web Vitals

In plain English?

Your site gets built properly, connected correctly, found by search engines, and looked after after launch.

  • SEO setup so Google understands what your business does.
  • Technical setup so domains, email, security, and tracking are not your problem.
  • Ongoing care so small edits, updates, backups, and weird website chores stay off your plate.

What Gets Covered

The fun part is having a polished website. The complicated part is everything behind it: domains, SEO, forms, tracking, hosting, security, updates, and all the little things that break when no one is watching.

Website Build

Clean custom design, mobile-friendly layouts, service sections, contact forms, domain connection, launch support, and a site that actually looks like your business belongs online.

SEO Setup

Keyword-informed titles, meta descriptions, structured data, sitemap submission, indexing, Search Console setup, image optimization, and the foundations Google needs to understand your business.

Website Care

Secure managed hosting, backups, updates, small edits, security checks, Quarterly SEO check-ins, performance reviews, and the ongoing website chores that should not be living on your to-do list.

Choose Your Starting Point

One build fee to get your site live. Then choose the care level that matches the size of your site, so your hosting, updates, backups, Quarterly SEO check-ins, and support stay covered without paying for more than you need. Your quote is based on what your website needs to do, how much content you have, and what features or integrations are included. You’ll always receive a clear fixed quote before work begins.

Site Builds

Choose the website build that matches what your business needs now.

Site Coverage

Your website doesn’t stop working after launch. Site Coverage keeps it hosted, secure, backed up, updated, and supported, so you can stay focused on running your business instead of managing your website. No contracts. Cancel anytime. Your website always belongs to you.

Need something outside your plan?

New pages, redesigns, advanced features, integrations, ecommerce additions, or larger content projects are quoted separately before work begins, so you’ll always know the price before any work starts.

From Free Call to Covered Site

01

Book a Free Strategy Session

Choose a time, answer one quick question about your business, and receive your meeting link by email. No pressure, no obligation.

02

We Build Your Site

We turn your services, reviews, photos, and business details into a clean custom site with SEO foundations, mobile optimization, tracking, and technical setup handled.

03

You Review + Approve

You review the demo, tell us what to tweak, and we make it right before anything gets connected to your domain.

04

It Goes Live + Stays Covered

Your site launches, your contact details work, your SEO foundations are in place, and ongoing website care keeps the chores off your plate.

No Bloated Templates. No SEO Snake Oil.

Your job is running your business.

Our job is making sure your website simply works.

Secure managed hosting. SEO. Domains. Security. Forms. Analytics. Updates. The little technical things that quietly keep your website healthy, secure, and performing long after launch.

Handled.

You stay focused on your business. We'll keep your website covered.

Book a Free Website Strategy Call

Book your free strategy session.

Pick a time that works for you. We’ll talk through your goals, answer your questions, and map out the best next step together. You’ll receive your meeting link by email and can join from your computer, tablet, or phone.

What happens during the call?

  • We learn what your business does and what your website needs to accomplish.
  • We review your current site if you already have one.
  • We talk through the best path forward, from a simple starter site to a fuller business website.
  • You can ask questions about pricing, SEO, timelines, care plans, and the confusing tech pieces.

No pressure. No obligation. No confusing web-speak required.

Consultation Details

Length: 30 minutes

Meeting options: Google Meet or Phone

How it works: If you choose Google Meet, your confirmation email includes your meeting link. If you prefer a phone call, we'll call you at your scheduled time. Most people can join from any browser or phone with no special setup.

Backup contact: Call or text (541) 238-2005

Who you’ll meet: Chrystle, the person building your site. No sales team, no handoff.

Hours:
Tuesday-Friday, 10 AM-5 PM
Saturday, 11 AM-5 PM
Monday + Sunday, Closed
